response.justification: Candidate exceeds the baseline 15-year requirement with strong technical progression and an MIT degree, plus entrepreneurial founding experience. However, the role explicitly seeks a Principal Engineer with 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI,' preferably backed by a Master's or PhD in AI. The candidate's resume shows recent AI infrastructure work at re:cinq (started April 2025) but lacks demonstrated deep specialization, published thought leadership, or track record building AI-powered products. The timing and depth of AI involvement are insufficient for a Director-level AI Strategy position.
strengths: 15+ years of proven software engineering experience with progression to staff-level roles and founder of GISCollective
MIT Bachelor's in Computer Science combined with demonstrated entrepreneurial and technical leadership capability
Strong full-stack foundation across cloud (AWS CDK, Kubernetes), infrastructure (Docker), and multiple backend technologies
concerns: No Master's degree or PhD in AI/ML-related field; AI experience appears limited to recent infrastructure work rather than deep specialization or research background
No demonstrated track record of building recognized AI products, platforms, or advising strategic customers on AI adoption—core responsibilities for this role
Current AI infrastructure role only 2 months old as of today's date, insufficient to establish the depth of expertise expected for a Principal Engineer focused on AI Strategy
